research_history_boundary.claim: mechanically frozen exact-policy evaluation, not a globally pristine historical market holdout; forward shadow/live remains the final generalization test

novelty_boundary.distinct_axis: a completed bursty/concentrated aggressive-flow vacuum followed by a separate completed bar with opposite aggressive flow and price reversal

source_contract.source_gap_policy: quarantine each source-ID-gap UTC day, every missing feature bucket, and the following 24 five-minute bars; never impute

claim_boundary.claim: opposite aggressive flow plus price reversal after a concentrated aggressive-flow vacuum can proxy a short-lived refill transition

causal_feature_contract.setup_burst: interarrival_burstiness[t0] >= strictly-prior q80 over the last 8,640 clean observations, requiring 2,016
causal_feature_contract.setup_concentration: event_notional_hhi[t0] >= strictly-prior q80 over the last 8,640 clean observations, requiring 2,016
causal_feature_contract.confirmation_bucket: the immediately following completed bucket t1

execution_contract.entry: next five-minute open t2 after t1 closes
execution_contract.exit: scheduled open after 12 held five-minute bars
execution_contract.funding: realized settlement cash is accounting-only if present; funding is never a signal input
execution_contract.strict_mdd: global/pre-entry high-water; held favorable-before-adverse OHLC; entry, hypothetical liquidation, and exit costs
execution_contract.cagr_clock: full wall-clock split including idle cash

support_freeze_before_returns.required_path: setup, confirmation, entry, every held bucket, and exit must be inside the split and outside quarantine

falsification_controls.no_reversal_confirmation: setup bucket itself becomes the signal bucket; next-open entry
falsification_controls.one_bar_extra_delay: same action and hold, entry one bar later
falsification_controls.one_day_shifted_setup: confirmation paired with setup features exactly 288 bars earlier
falsification_controls.sign_permuted_confirmation: fixed-seed 20260717 permutation of confirmation flow signs; rejection control
falsification_controls.placebo_rule: reject if a time-shift or sign-permutation placebo independently passes all primary train/selection performance gates

orthogonality_after_outcomes.compare_against: all live/shadow portfolio anchors with reproducible entry clocks

rejection_contract: any support or pre-2024 performance failure rejects LVRT-R0; do not change quantile, confirmation, side, hold, costs, or gates
